message:
feat: use npm to install Claude, Codex, and Gemini CLIs

- Install Node.js LTS from NodeSource repository
- Install @anthropic-ai/claude-code via npm
- Install @openai/codex via npm
- Install @google/gemini-cli via npm
- Update documentation to list all three AI CLI tools
- Rename container to 'AI CLIs' to reflect multiple tools

files.patch:
@@ -1,17 +1,20 @@
-# Based on Microsoft's devcontainer base image with Claude and Codex installed
+# Based on Microsoft's devcontainer base image with AI CLIs installed
 FROM mcr.microsoft.com/devcontainers/base:ubuntu
 
-# Install Claude Code and OpenAI Codex
+# Install Node.js (required for npm packages)
 RUN apt-get update && \
-    apt-get install -y curl wget && \
-    # Install Claude Code
-    curl -fsSL https://claude.com/install.sh | sh && \
-    # Install OpenAI Codex CLI
-    curl -fsSL https://openai.com/install-codex.sh | sh && \
+    apt-get install -y curl && \
+    curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_lts.x | bash - && \
+    apt-get install -y nodejs && \
     apt-get clean && \
     rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
 
-# Ensure claude and codex are in PATH for all users
+# Install AI CLI tools globally
+RUN npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code \
+                   @openai/codex \
+                   @google/gemini-cli
+
+# Ensure all tools are in PATH for all users
 ENV PATH="/usr/local/bin:${PATH}"
 
 # Set the default user (matches devcontainer convention)

@@ -5,8 +5,11 @@ This is the default dev container used by cage when a project doesn't have its o
 ## What's Included
 
 - Microsoft devcontainer base (Ubuntu)
-- Claude Code pre-installed
-- OpenAI Codex CLI pre-installed
+- Node.js LTS
+- AI CLI tools (npm global packages):
+  - `@anthropic-ai/claude-code` - Claude Code CLI
+  - `@openai/codex` - OpenAI Codex CLI
+  - `@google/gemini-cli` - Google Gemini CLI
 - Git and common utilities
 - User: `vscode` (UID 1000)

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 {
-  "name": "Cage Default Container with Claude & Codex",
+  "name": "Cage Default Container with AI CLIs",
   "dockerFile": "Dockerfile",
   "remoteUser": "vscode",
   "features": {
